problem_statement: MAF runtime binding readiness needs a static ABI/CLI contract witness before any subprocess, CLI execution, PyO3, or Python-to-Rust call path can be reconsidered.
success_criteria: MafAbiCliContractWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
MafAbiCliContractWitness binds MAF workspace manifest, maf-cli manifest, maf-cli entry, MAF parity witness refs, command contracts, gap refs, UAO refs, LifeMeaningJudgment refs, and receipt refs
MafAbiCliContractWitness records CLI scaffold-only status and keeps command behavior AwaitingEvidence

MafAbiCliContractWitness blocks CLI execution, subprocess execution, PyO3 binding, Rust crate execution, Python Rust imports, external connector calls, network calls, secret access, filesystem writes, runtime dispatch, canonical state mutation, terminal closure, and success claims
MafAbiCliContractWitness rejects authority drift, scaffold drift, digest drift, command execution drift, missing gap refs, secret markers, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
constraints: runtime_binding_claimed, command_behavior_claimed, and subprocess_effect_boundary_closed remain false
each CLI artifact digest must match repository-local source files
all command contracts must retain execution_allowed false and non-empty gap refs
